contract_meta.enhancement: Durable step orchestration with cooperative cancellation and resilient resume UX
contract_meta.rationale: Existing pause/resume infrastructure surfaces paused states but continues work, never restarts on resume, and blocks on dependency validation. This contract hardens the orchestration spine to match CDI expectations and industry durability patterns.

project.name: UMCA Executor MVP
project.goal: Deliver resilient pause/resume that halts within one step, resumes via durable checkpoints, and presents clear UI/observability signals.
project.scope: Backend orchestration queue, abort propagation, child-process governance, frontend pause UX, dependency policy tuning, validation & observability.
out_of_scope: Provider feature expansion beyond abort support
Large-scale performance tuning beyond current flows

execution_model.verification_strategy: Unit tests for step orchestration/cancellation, API & queue integration tests, Playwright pause/resume E2E, contract & SBOM gates.
execution_model.description: Refactor execution into checkpointed steps backed by queue semantics, propagate abort across LLM and subprocesses, repair resume UX, and validate end-to-end.
execution_model.failure_mode: HALT on validation, contract, or abort-safety regression

observability.description: Structured pause/resume/abort events with step checkpoints and metrics.

monitoring.metrics: Pause/resume counts, abort latency, SIGTERM/SIGKILL escalations

tasks.title: Map current pause/resume integration points
tasks.description: Trace backend, queue, and frontend flows to document where pause state is ignored or mishandled.
actions: Trace /api/execute lifecycle, noting checkpoints, fallbacks, and SSE hooks
Document resume endpoint behavior and missing re-entry points
Inventory frontend pause handling, error paths, and snapshot usage
Summarize dependency preflight policy and abort propagation gaps
validation: Discovery note with code snippets committed (.automation/phaseE_hardening_discovery_note.md)
success_criteria: Integration points recorded with file and line references
Abort/queue/fallback gaps enumerated
Frontend/API contract mismatches captured

tasks.title: Introduce step queue and checkpoint store
tasks.description: Refactor execution into BullMQ-backed (or inline-compatible) step jobs with durable checkpoint persistence.
actions: Create src/orchestrator/stepQueue.ts with enqueue/dispatch for clarify, plan, generateChunk, testChunk, repair, finalize
Implement src/orchestrator/checkpointStore.ts persisting checkpoints + workspace manifest pointers
Update server.ts to submit the first step via the queue abstraction even in inline mode
Add unit tests covering enqueue/dequeue, checkpoint versioning, and idempotent resume
success_criteria: Each step persists checkpoint with next-step cursor
Queue jobs can be replayed after process restart in tests
Inline fallback still routes through stepQueue for determinism

tasks.title: Make resume requeue the next unfinished step
tasks.description: Ensure pause responses return 202 with step metadata and resume enqueues the next job rather than falling through to single execution.
actions: Update /api/execute to stream via SSE and exit with {paused:true, stepId} payload on PausedError
Enhance /api/sessions/:id/resume to load checkpoint, validate state, and enqueue the next step job
Remove single-execution fallbacks triggered by PausedError in planning/clarify catches
Add integration tests proving resume restarts execution exactly once per request
success_criteria: Resume API enqueues next step and returns 202/200 with resume metadata
No code path re-enters single execution on pause-triggered errors
Integration test verifies paused session completes after resume

tasks.title: Propagate AbortSignal through LLM providers
tasks.description: Thread session AbortSignal into generateJSON, OpenAI, Anthropic providers, and post-call guards to stop work within <1s.
actions: Extend generateJSON signature to accept {sessionId, abortSignal, onToken}
Wire abort signals or polling loops in provider adapters with graceful stream shutdown
Add post-call throwIfAborted checkpoints across plan/generation/repair flows
Author unit tests simulating abort mid-stream and verifying PausedError handling
success_criteria: LLM calls exit within configured poll/abort interval after pause
Partial outputs are not committed when aborted
Tests cover both signal-supporting and polling-only providers

tasks.title: Abort sandboxed processes and guard fallbacks
tasks.description: Ensure child processes, dependency installs, and repair loops terminate promptly on pause and do not restart automatically.
actions: Augment runInSandbox to register onAbort hooks that send SIGTERM then SIGKILL after a grace period
Plumb abort checks before spawning subprocesses (npm install, tests, formatters)
Short-circuit planning fallback blocks when PausedError is detected
Write unit tests covering SIGTERM escalation and PausedError propagation
success_criteria: Paused sessions do not leave orphaned child processes
Fallback paths skip single execution when pause caused the error
Tests assert SIGKILL escalation for stubborn processes

tasks.title: Normalize pause UX and snapshot caching
tasks.description: Teach the frontend to treat 202 as paused state, freeze progress indicators, and reuse immediate snapshots.
actions: Update public/script.js fetch handlers to branch on paused payloads instead of treating 202 as errors
Cache last snapshot immediately after pause and stop polling until resume
Surface resume controls with clear state messaging and provider badge
Add Playwright specs verifying paused cards, resume flow, and no error toast
success_criteria: Pause shows dedicated UI state without error banners
Resume resumes polling and progress indicators exactly once
Playwright test passes under CI-friendly timeouts

tasks.title: Tune dependency preflight and structured logging
tasks.description: Relax preflight to warn on deprecated/mismatched versions while emitting actionable logs and checkpoint metadata.
actions: Adjust validation options to allow deprecated/version mismatch with warnings only
Emit structured dependency reports into execution_trace.jsonl and resume payloads
Document new policy in docs/02_111025_todays_status.md
Add unit tests covering deprecated and mismatch scenarios
success_criteria: Resume flows no longer fail on deprecated packages
Warnings appear in trace logs with remediation guidance
Tests capture warning-only behavior

tasks.title: Instrument pause/resume telemetry
tasks.description: Add structured logging, metrics, and runbook updates for pause/resume lifecycle events.
actions: Emit structured log events for pause, resume, abort, step completion with durations and provider metadata
Update SSE payloads to include stepId and manifest hash
Document observability schema and troubleshooting steps in docs/02_111025_todays_status.md
Add unit coverage for logging helpers
success_criteria: Logs show pause/resume events with session and step identifiers
SSE stream consumers receive consistent metadata
Runbook captures how to diagnose stuck pauses

tasks.title: Run full validation suite and pause/resume E2E
tasks.description: Execute mandatory quality gates plus targeted E2E proving pause/resume durability.
actions: npm run lint
npm run typecheck
npm test
npm run contract:check
npm run sbom
npm run test:ui -- pause-resume-cycle.spec.ts
Capture artifacts in .automation/playwright-report/
success_criteria: Pause/resume E2E demonstrates multiple cycles without fallback
Coverage thresholds (≥80% line, ≥75% branch) maintained
SBOM regenerated without errors

tasks.title: Publish evidence bundle and update contracts
tasks.description: Summarize implementation, attach observability schema, and record validation outcomes.
actions: Author .automation/phaseE_hardening_validation_report.md with command outputs and E2E screenshots
Update contracts/Roadmap_execution/14_phase5_orchestration_contract.json appendix if needed
Summarize telemetry schema and new policies in docs/02_111025_todays_status.md
success_criteria: Evidence links to logs, tests, Playwright artifacts
Contract references align with implemented step list
Stakeholders can trace pause/resume lifecycle from documentation

ai_executor_guidelines.wins_30_45_minutes: All win tasks are scoped to 30-45 minutes with independent validation.
ai_executor_guidelines.tests_first: Implement or update tests alongside each win before refactoring adjacent code.
ai_executor_guidelines.pause_latency_target: <= 1s after current step completes; ensure step durations stay <=60s.
ai_executor_guidelines.observability_required: Every pause/resume emits structured events recorded in .automation/execution_trace.jsonl.

governance_note.for_human: This hardening contract transforms pause/resume into a durable, restartable workflow patterned after Replit-style step orchestration and BullMQ research, addressing repeated user-reported gaps.
